zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Woodville於1405年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾葛拉芙頓 雷吉時，她的父親Sir Richard Woodville20歲，母親Joan Bedlisgate15歲。她於1429年7月18日與William Haute在法國帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1462年5月18日在英國肯特坎特布瑞享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Woodville于1405年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾葛拉芙頓 雷吉时，她的父亲Sir Richard Woodville20岁，母亲Joan Bedlisgate15岁。她于1429年7月18日与William Haute在法国帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1462年5月18日在英国肯特坎特布瑞享年57岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特坎特布瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Woodville was born in 1405, in Grafton Regis, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Richard Woodville, was 20 and her mother, Joan Bedlisgate, was 15. She married William Haute on 18 July 1429, in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 18 May 1462, in Canterbury, Kent, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Woodville est née en 1405, à Grafton Regis, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Woodville, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Joan Bedlisgate, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé William Haute le 18 juillet 1429, à Calais, Pas-de-Calais, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 mai 1462, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Woodville 1405 in Grafton Regis, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Woodville 20 und ihre Mutter Joan Bedlisgate 15. Sie hat am 18. Juli 1429 in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich William Haute geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. Mai 1462 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Canterbury, Kent, England und wurde in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato William Haute il 18 luglio 1429, nel Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Joan Woodvilleが1405年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグラフトン レジスで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Woodvilleは20歳，母Joan Bedlisgateは15歳であった。1429年7月18日にフランスプアス-デ-カレイスカレイスでWilliam Hauteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1462年5月18日にイギリスケントカンテルブリーで57歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントカンテルブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Woodville(이)가 1405년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 그라프턴 레지스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Woodville(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Bedlisgate(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1429년 7월 18일 프랑스 파스-데-캘레이 캘레이에서 William Haute(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1462년 5월 18일 영국 켄트 캉르버이에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Woodville nasceu em 1405, em Grafton Regis, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Woodville, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Joan Bedlisgate, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com William Haute em 18 de julho de 1429, em Calais, Pas-de-Calais, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de maio de 1462, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Woodville родилась в 1405 г. в местности графтон регис, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Woodville было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Bedlisgate, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Haute 18 июля 1429 г. в местности калеи, пас-де-калеи, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 18 мая 1462 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con William Haute el 18 de julio de 1429, en Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 18 de mayo de 1462, en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
